# @agent-os/evals Public API

Status: 0.5.x active development. Public exports are limited to eval authoring DSL, symbolic config, case/context types, and deterministic assertion declarations.

- `.:defineEval`
- `.:defineEvalConfig`
- `.:defineEvalDataset`
- `.:evalAssertion`
